title: This Matters
description: Allows you to compress organic matter into coal blocks
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/W1HYZK4.png) This mod allows you to compress organic matter (think grass, crops, planks) into a solid block. By default it allows you to turn matter + 1 Coal into a Coal Block, using Datapacks more compressing recipes can be added to the **Organic Matter Compressor**. You can even use datapacks to add different matter values to different items/blocks. For the **Organic Matter Compressor** to work it needs to be placed at Y 15 or below for optimal pressure. (can be changed in the config) This mod is recreates the block by the same name from [**Gany's Surface**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ganys-surface "Gany's Surface")
